sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 3.31 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.3)

statement.latex: Find necessary and sufficient conditions under which every pure subgroup of a completely decomposable torsion-free abelian group is itself completely decomposable. { A.\,P.\,Mishina} These have been found (L.\,Bican, Czech. Math.~J., { 24} (1974), 176--191; \ A.\,A.\,Krav\-chen\-ko, Vestnik Moskov. Univ. Ser. 1 Mat. Mekh., { 1980}, no.\,3, p.\,104 (Russian)).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
